name: South Carolina Barbeque Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except soy sauce and butter in a saucepan.
2. Simmer over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from the heat.
4. Stir in the soy sauce and butter until well combined.
5. This sauce can be used as a basting sauce for barbecue meat or served as a condiment with grilled pork, beef, or chicken.
